laliga.articleTitle: Simeone won't rush Le Normand after brain trauma
laliga.articleContent: Atlético Madrid cannot provide a timeline for defender Robin Le Normand's return from a traumatic brain injury, manager Diego Simeone said on Saturday.
laliga.author: Reuters

laliga.articleTitle: PSG to go to courts over Mbappé $60M pay ruling
laliga.articleContent: Paris Saint-Germain will take their wage dispute with Kylian Mbappé to court after the Ligue de Football Professionnel (LFP) ruled in favor of the France captain.
laliga.author: Reuters

laliga.articleTitle: Four reasons Barcelona are favorites to beat Real Madrid in El Clasico
laliga.articleContent: Saturday's Clasico is an unexpected matchup: On paper Real Madrid should be the favorites, but Barcelona have been far more convincing this season.
laliga.author: Ryan O'Hanlon

laliga.articleTitle: Ancelotti: Mbappé knows what to do in Clásico bow
laliga.articleContent: Kylian Mbappé "knows what he has to do" in his first Clásico, Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti said on Friday, backing the star forward to deliver in this weekend's top-of-the-table LaLiga clash.
laliga.author: Alex Kirkland, Rodrigo Faez

laliga.articleTitle: Raphinha: I considered Barça exit 'several' times
laliga.articleContent: Barcelona forward Raphinha has told ESPN he considered leaving the club on several occasions during his first two seasons.

laliga.articleTitle: Coaching in a Clásico: What's it like in the dugout for Real Madrid vs. Barcelona?
laliga.articleContent: As Barcelona boss Hansi Flick prepares for his first trip to Real Madrid, those who've coached in a Clásico tell ESPN about the game's unique pressure.

laliga.articleTitle: Pedri: Barcelona youth thriving under Flick
laliga.articleContent: Barcelona midfielder Pedri has praised coach Hansi Flick for giving young players the confidence needed to thrive.

laliga.articleTitle: Ex-Barça boss Setién eyes MLS job in future
laliga.articleContent: Former Barcelona head coach Quique Setién has said he would be keen to coach in Major League Soccer in the future.

laliga.articleTitle: Madrid derby: 4 arrested for Vini hate campaign
laliga.articleContent: Spain's national police have arrested four people responsible for a hate campaign against Real Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior.

laliga.articleTitle: Sources: GK Courtois out 3-4 weeks with injury
laliga.articleContent: Thibaut Courtois has been ruled out of this weekend's El Clásico against Barcelona due to an "adductor injury in his left leg," sources have told ESPN.

laliga.articleTitle: What to know about El Clásico, Real Madrid vs. Barcelona tale of the tape
laliga.articleContent: The stage is perfectly set for this season's first Clásico. How do Real Madrid and Barcelona's teams compare? What are the key clashes? Who will win?

premier.articleTitle: Trent: I want to be 1st full-back to win Ballon d'Or
premier.articleContent: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold has said his primary career goal is to become the first full-back to win the Ballon d'Or, adding that he would like to be remembered as the greatest right-back of all time.
premier.author: ESPN

premier.articleTitle: Maresca: 'Expected more' from captain James
premier.articleContent: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has said the club's dressing room lacks a "proper leader" and has been left "expecting more" from captain Reece James this season.

premier.articleTitle: LIVE Transfer Talk: Arsenal could swoop for Newcastle's Isak

premier.articleTitle: Pep: City won't have United-like collapse if I leave
premier.articleContent: Pep Guardiola has said there will not be a Manchester United-style collapse at Manchester City if he decides to quit as manager in the summer.

premier.articleTitle: Wood brace earns Forest derby win at Leicester
premier.articleContent: Chris Wood scored a brace as Nottingham Forest moved up to fifth in the Premier League with a 3-1 victory over hosts Leicester City in the East Midlands derby on Friday, underlining their excellent start to the season.

premier.articleTitle: Ten Hag: 'I deny, ignore' 3-0 home loss to Spurs
premier.articleContent: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has said that he has chosen to "deny" and "ignore" his team's 3-0 home defeat to Tottenham.

premier.articleTitle: Arteta dismisses injury crisis: 'We don't feel sorry'

premier.articleTitle: Premier League injury and suspension news, predicted lineups, fantasy updates

premier.articleTitle: Ange won't rush Moore amid Neymar comparison

premier.articleTitle: Can Rodri, football's ultimate team player, win the Ballon d'Or?

premier.articleTitle: English football regulator moves step closer
premier.articleContent: An independent football regulator (IFR) for the English game is a step closer to becoming reality, with the Football Governance Bill set to be introduced to parliament on Thursday in the House of Lords.

premier.articleTitle: Player ratings: Liverpool continue perfect in Champions League thanks to Núñez winner
premier.articleContent: Liverpool continue unbeaten in the UEFA Champions League with an important performance and goal from Darwin Núñez in their 1-0 win over RB Leipzig.

premier.articleTitle: Wilshere leaves Arsenal for Norwich coaching role
premier.articleContent: Jack Wilshere has left his role as Arsenal's under-18s coach, joining Championship club Norwich City as a first-team coach in Johannes Hoff Thorup's backroom staff.

bundes.articleTitle: Dortmund need a miracle to turn underwhelming season around
bundes.articleContent: Borussia Dortmund have looked unconvincing in the Bundesliga, they were embarrassed in the Champions League, and it's hard to see how them improving.

bundes.articleTitle: Boniface has last laugh over Marmoush in Bundesliga blockbuster
bundes.articleContent: Two of the most in-form African players of the season found themselves going head to head, as Victor Boniface's Bayer Leverkusen met Omar Marmoush and Eintracht Frankfurt in Germany.

bundes.articleTitle: Liverpool and Chelsea impress, Real Madrid look bad, more: Marcotti recaps the weekend
bundes.articleContent: Liverpool may have beaten Chelsea on Sunday, but both sides can find the positives. PLUS: Real Madrid don't look good, Harry Kane broke his scoring drought and Arsenal hurt themselves ... again.
bundes.author: Gabriele Marcotti

bundes.articleTitle: Arsenal suffer nightmare of a matchday; Barça future shines brightly
bundes.articleContent: As if losing wasn't bad enough, Arsenal's rivals Liverpool and City also earned big wins. What else did you miss in European football this weekend?

bundes.articleTitle: Reports: Leverkusen's Boniface in car accident
bundes.articleContent: Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface was involved in a car crash following the club's 2-1 victory over Eintracht Frankfurt, German media reported on Sunday.

bundes.articleTitle: Mainz fans turn on Klopp over Red Bull exec role
bundes.articleContent: Jürgen Klopp was criticised by fans of his former club Mainz on Saturday over his decision to join energy drinks company Red Bull and oversee its football clubs.
bundes.author: Associated Press

bundes.articleTitle: Can Klopp make Red Bull more likeable? Probably not in Germany
bundes.articleContent: In Germany, where football's commercialisation isn't celebrated like it is elsewhere, Jürgen Klopp's decision to join Red Bull hasn't gone down well.
bundes.author: Derek Rae

bundes.articleTitle: Report: Injuries cost top clubs $800M last season
bundes.articleContent: Players in Germany's Bundesliga are most likely to be injured amongst Europe's top five domestic leagues but England's Premier League bears the most injury-related costs, according to a report published on Tuesday.
bundes.author: Reuters

seria.articleTitle: Italy legend Totti open to Serie A return at 48
seria.articleContent: Roma legend Francesco Totti has claimed that Serie A teams are still calling him to see if he would return to professional football, adding that he thinks it would take two to three months of training to return to playing fitness.

seria.articleTitle: Juve deny Güler signing after X account hacked
seria.articleContent: Juventus said one of their social media accounts was hacked on Monday, after fans were taken by surprise with the fake announcement of Real Madrid's Turkish teenager Arda Güler signing for the Italian club.

seria.articleTitle: Inter's win over Roma marred by injury concerns
seria.articleContent: Inter Milan suffered double injury blow as Hakan Çalhanoğlu and Francesco Acerbi limp off on Sunday in the 1-0 win against Roma.
seria.author: ESPN News Services

seria.articleTitle: Milan coach hails 'fantastic' Pulisic for role in win
seria.articleContent: AC Milan manager Paulo Fonseca praised Christian Pulisic's all-round performance as his side beat Udinese 1-0 on Saturday despite being down to 10 men for more than an hour.
seria.author: ESPN News Services

seria.articleContent: Paul Pogba's hopes of playing for Juventus again took a hit on Saturday when the club's director Cristiano Giuntoli said that the Serie A side are complete without him.

seria.articleTitle: Tyler Adams fit to return for B'mouth vs. Arsenal
seria.articleContent: Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams remains on track to make his season debut against Arsenal in the Premier League on Saturday.

seria.articleTitle: Explaining how USMNT star Christian Pulisic is putting up career-best numbers

seria.articleTitle: Fàbregas: Pep Guardiola taught me the most
seria.articleContent: Cesc Fàbregas has said he learned patience from Arsène Wenger and bravery from José Mourinho, but Pep Guardiola was the coach that had the biggest impact on his career when he played under him at Barcelona.

seria.articleTitle: European football chiefs slam FIFA over schedule
seria.articleContent: European football chiefs and the global players' union, FIFPro, united on Monday to criticise FIFA over the global football calendar and filed an antitrust lawsuit against the governing body.

seria.articleTitle: LIVE Transfer Talk: PSG keeping tabs on Inter striker Thuram
seria.articleContent: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly aiming to sign Internazionale striker Marcus Thuram next summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

seria.articleTitle: Poch: Pulisic among world's best, needs protecting
seria.articleContent: USMNT manager Mauricio Pochettino hailed Christian Pulisic as one of the world's best offensive players but said he was concerned about the AC Milan star's workload amid his stellar start to the season.
